profiles.lifecycle_review_body: This view shows the latest trustworthy lifecycle markers we know for the current profile or draft.
profiles.lifecycle_review_active: Use these markers to verify where this profile came from, when it was last saved, and whether it is active or archived now.
profiles.wizard_lifecycle_summary_body: Latest known lifecycle markers for this profile or draft.
profiles.lifecycle_item_created_draft: This draft has not been saved yet.
profiles.lifecycle_item_saved_draft: There is no saved version yet.
profiles.lifecycle_item_state_saved: This saved profile is currently active.
profiles.lifecycle_item_state_clone_draf: This is a draft based on another saved profile.
profiles.wizard_export_ready_body: Download the saved version in JSON, YAML, or Firefox policies.json. If you still need a technical pass, open Advanced document.
profiles.wizard_export_guided_summary_bo: Skim the main Firefox experiences in plain language, then jump back into any step that still needs tuning.
profiles.wizard_export_guided_empty: Firefox defaults stay in place here. Change this area only if the profile needs a managed rule.
profiles.wizard_export_shareable_body: Use this plain-language handoff when someone needs the profile outcome without reading the full document or step-by-step review.
profiles.wizard_export_shareable_status_: This handoff text updates as the profile changes.
Could not copy the summary. You can still select the text manually.
profiles.wizard_export_shareable_notice_: Firefox mostly stays on its normal defaults in the guided areas.
profiles.wizard_export_guided_features_a: {count} known add-ons with their own rules
profiles.wizard_progress_six: Step 6 of 8: Accounts, languages, add-ons & sites
profiles.wizard_step_actions_idle: Use these step tools when you want to back out of local changes without resetting the whole profile.
profiles.wizard_step_actions_clean: This step still matches the current profile state.
profiles.wizard_step_actions_both: This step has local changes. You can undo the current pass or reset the step to the saved profile baseline.
profiles.wizard_step_actions_undo_only: This step changed during the current pass. You can undo those local edits.
profiles.wizard_step_actions_reset_only: This step differs from the saved profile baseline. Reset it if you want to start this area over.
profiles.wizard_step_actions_invalid: Fix the current JSON or YAML file before undoing or resetting this step.
profiles.wizard_step_actions_read_only: This review step does not make profile changes, so there is nothing to undo or reset here.
profiles.wizard_step_reset_done: Step reset to the current profile baseline.
profiles.wizard_step_memory_empty: As you move through the wizard, the latest changed steps will stay visible here.
profiles.wizard_step_memory_active: The latest changed steps stay here so you do not have to jump to export just to remember what moved.
profiles.wizard_step_memory_step_setup: Updated setup details, scenario choice, or starting baseline.
profiles.wizard_step_memory_step_network: Changed browser upkeep, proxy, or enterprise access posture.
profiles.wizard_step_memory_step_home: Changed homepage, startup, or Firefox Home surfaces.
profiles.wizard_step_memory_step_search: Changed search defaults, suggestions, or custom search behavior.
profiles.wizard_step_memory_step_privacy: Changed privacy, hardening, site permissions, or cleanup posture.
profiles.wizard_step_memory_step_feature: Changed add-ons, websites, languages, sync, or managed browser surfaces.
profiles.wizard_step_memory_step_ai: Changed built-in AI availability or smart browser surfaces.
profiles.wizard_step_memory_step_generic: Changed guided settings on this step.
profiles.wizard_finish_invalid: Fix invalid JSON or YAML before finishing.
profiles.wizard_finish_name_required: Profile name is required before finishing.
profiles.wizard_network_applied: Landing, search, and proxy settings updated.
profiles.empty_list: No profiles match the current filters right now.
profiles.list_click_hint: Open this profile to continue the browser setup.
profiles.compare_body: Review one saved profile against the currently open setup through the same canonical profile snapshot.
profiles.compare_empty_body: Open one profile, then choose Compare on another saved profile from the library.
profiles.compare_empty_need_base: Open a saved profile first, then choose another one from the library to compare it side by side.
profiles.compare_empty_pick_other: Choose Compare on another saved profile from the library to review the differences here.
profiles.compare_empty_invalid: Fix invalid JSON or YAML in the current profile file before running a comparison.
profiles.compare_current_saved_copy: Open profile, including any unsaved edits. Schema: {schema}.
profiles.compare_other_copy: Saved profile from the library. Schema: {schema}.
profiles.compare_changes_body: This list stays short on purpose and shows the first meaningful areas that differ.
profiles.compare_changes_active: Top differences between the current setup and the selected profile.
profiles.compare_changes_none: Both profiles currently match in metadata, policies, and preferences.
profiles.compare_guided_areas_body: This view groups differences by wizard areas so it is easier to see which part of the setup changed most.
profiles.compare_guided_areas_active: The biggest differences below are grouped by guided wizard area.
profiles.compare_guided_areas_none: There are no guided-area differences to review.
profiles.clone_meta: Draft based on {name}. Save it as a separate profile when you are ready.
profiles.confirm_soft_delete: Archive this profile? You can restore it later.
profiles.confirm_hard_delete: Delete this profile permanently? This cannot be undone.
profiles.confirm_reset_library: Delete every profile in the library permanently? This cannot be undone.
profiles.draft_ready_meta: Draft ready. Add profile details and browser rules, then save.
profiles.status_draft_ready: Draft ready. Enter a unique profile name and save when you are ready.
profiles.create_name_required: Profile name is required to create a draft.
